category_sources: source_facts.description says it is an implementation of malloc emphasizing fragmentation avoidance; official homepage describes jemalloc as a general-purpose malloc implementation.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is jemalloc; official homepage heading is 'jemalloc'.
docs_sources: Official jemalloc homepage has a Documentation section linking to the jemalloc(3) manual page and project wiki.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already populated with https://github.com/jemalloc/jemalloc; per instruction repo returned null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies malloc and fragmentation avoidance; official homepage mentions scalable concurrency, heap profiling, monitoring, and tuning hooks.
